docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2025 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO FEB-04-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MARY-FAITH CERASOLI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JACK LAPIDOS IS PRESENT. PARTIES ARE IN THE PROCESS OF AMICABLY SETTLING THEIR CASE. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2026 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-25-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARY-FAITH CERASOLI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JACK LAPIDOS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF MARY FAITH CERASOLI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JACK LAPIDOS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS MORE THAN THE MONETARY LIMIT OF SMALL CLAIMS, AND WILL NOT WAIVE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
